about.title: About
about.description: Full-stack developer with experience designing and implementing backend services, cloud migrations, and system modernization. Skilled in building APIs, automating workflows, and integrating AI-powered solutions such as OCR and validation systems. Strong focus on performance, security, and maintainable architecture. Experienced in refactoring legacy codebases and establishing cleaner project structures. Motivated by complex technical challenges and scalable system design.

links.description: Connect with me on various platforms and explore my projects.
